title: Apparatus for manufacturing a composite panel comprising a double sided adhesive film interposed between two thin metal sheets
abstract: The invention relates to an apparatus for manufacturing a composite panel (28) comprising a first and a second copper sheet (2, 3) opposite to each other and adhering to a double sided adhesive film (4) interposed therebetween. The apparatus includes a first and a second lamination stage (1, 2). The first lamination stage (1) comprises a first and a second cylinder (5, 6) crossed by a first belt (7) made of PET on which the first copper sheet may be laid. The cylinders rotate in opposite directions, so as to cause the first belt and the sheet laying thereon to slide therebetween. The first cylinder is partially surrounded by a second belt (10) made of PET and by the double sided adhesive film which is thus dragged between the aforesaid cylinders and is caused to adhere to the first copper sheet so as to form a semi-finished panel (16) comprising one of the two copper sheets and the double sided adhesive film. The second lamination stage (2) comprises a third and a fourth cylinder (21, 22) crossed by a third belt (23) made of PET on which the semi-finished panel may be laid at the first copper sheet. The cylinders rotate in opposite directions so as to cause the third belt and the semi-finished panel laying thereon to slide therebetween. The second lamination stage also comprises a chute (25) on which the second copper sheet (3) may be laid and by means of which the latter may overlap the semi-finished panel at the double sided adhesive film included in the latter. The third and fourth cylinders compress the second copper sheet against the double sided adhesive film of the semi-finished panel so as to form the aforesaid composite panel.
claims:
Claims An apparatus for manufacturing a composite panel (28) comprising a first and a second metal sheet (2, 3) opposite to each other and adhering to a double sided adhesive film (4) interposed therebetween, said apparatus being characterized in that it comprises a first and a second lamination stage (1 , 20), said first lamination stage (1 ) including: â¢ first means (7) for supporting said first sheet (2); â¢ a first and a second cylinder (5, 6) opposite to each other and rotatable about the corresponding longitudinal axis, said first cylinder (5) being suitable for allowing an at least partial winding of said film (4) thereon; â¢ first means for translating said first support means (7) between said first and second cylinders (5, 6), â¢ second means for translating said first and second cylinders (5, 6) with respect to each other, at a reciprocal distance such as to press said film (4) against said first sheet (2) when the latter passes between said first and second cylinders (5, 6) such as to allow to obtain a semi-finished panel (16) comprising said first sheet (2) and said film (4) adhering to each other, said second lamination stage (20) including: â¢ second means (23) for supporting said semi-finished panel (16); â¢ means (25) for overlapping said second sheet (3) over said semi-finished panel (16) at said film (4); â¢ means (26, 27) for mutually aligning said second sheet (3) and said semi-finished panel (16); â¢ a third and a fourth cylinder (21 , 22) opposite to each other and rotatable about the corresponding longitudinal axis; â¢ third means for translating said second support means (23) between said third and fourth cylinders (21 , 22); â¢ fourth means for translating said third and fourth cylinders (21 , 22) with respect to each other at a reciprocal distance such as to press said second sheet (3) against said film (4) when said semi-finished panel (16) and said second sheet (3) pass between said third and fourth cylinders 

 (21 , 22). An apparatus according to claim 1 , characterized in that said first translation means comprise first means for rotating said first and second cylinders (5, 6) in opposite directions, and in that said third translation means comprise second means for rotating said third and fourth cylinders (21 , 22) in opposite directions. An apparatus according to claim 1 , characterized in that said first support means (7) comprise: â¢ a first belt (7) sliding between said first and second cylinders (5, 6); said second support means (23) comprising: â¢ a second belt (23) sliding between said third and fourth cylinders (21 , 22). An apparatus according to claim 1 , characterized in that said first lamination stage (1 ) comprises: â¢ a third belt (10) which at least partially reversibly covers said first cylinder (5), said third belt (10) being interposed between said film (4) and said first cylinder (5) when said film (4) is at least partially wound on said first cylinder (5). An apparatus according to claim 1 , characterized in that said second lamination stage (20) comprises: â¢ a fourth belt (24) which at least partially reversibly covers said third cylinder (21 ), said fourth belt (24) being interposed between said second sheet (3) and said third cylinder (21 ) when said second sheet (3) is at least partially interposed between said third and fourth cylinders (21 , 22). A apparatus according to claim 1 , characterized in that: â¢ at least one cylinder between said first and second cylinders (5, 6) is eiastically deformable due to a tightening of said first sheet (2) and said film (4) between said first and second cylinders (5, 6), â¢ at least one cylinder between said third and fourth cylinders (21 , 22) is eiastically deformable due to a tightening of said semi-finished panel (16) and said second sheet (3) between said third and fourth cylinders (21 , 22). 7. An apparatus according to claim 1 , characterized in that said overlapping means (25) comprise a chute (25) on which said second sheet (3) may be laid, said chute (25) being tilted toward said second support means (23). 8. An apparatus according to claim 1 , characterized in that said alignment means (26, 27) comprise: â¢ means (26) for stopping said semi-finished panel (16) and said second sheet (3); â¢ means (27) for moving said stop means (26) between a first position in which said stop means (26) are at least partially interposed between said third and fourth cylinders (21 , 22), and a second position in which said stop means (26) do not prevent a translation of said semi-finished panel (16) and of said second sheet (3) between said third and fourth cylinders (21 , 22). 9. An apparatus according to claim 1 , characterized in that said first lamination stage (1 ) comprises: â¢ means (15) for removing a first protective layer (12) adhering to said film (4) at a first face thereof. 10. An apparatus according to claim 1 , characterized in that said first lamination stage (1 ) comprises: â¢ means for removing a second protective layer (13) adhering to said film (4) at a second face thereof.
